            cell [e159] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "Complete: { \"pairs\": [ { \"question\": \"What is REC-0008.04 Business Relationships?\", \"reasoning\": \"The technique description directly supports a summary of adversary information gathering about business relationships, including third-party organizations and supply chain details. Parent tactic context frames it within reconnaissance purposes without overstepping hierarchy rules.\", \"answer\": \"REC-0008.04 Business Relationships describes how adversaries gather information about an organization's external partnerships that could aid targeting efforts. This includes identifying second or third-party entities like service providers or contractors with privileged network access or sensitive data, along with supply chain logistics and shipment pathways for hardware/software resources.\", \"pair_type\": \"technique_description\", \"control_id\": \"REC-0008.04\", \"evidence_quotes\": [ { \"quote\": \"Adversaries may gather information about the victim's business relationships that can be used during targeting.\", \"relevance\": \"Establishes the core adversarial behavior\" }, { \"quote\": \"Information about an mission’s business relationships may include a variety of details, including second or third-party organizations/domains (ex: managed service providers, contractors/sub-contractors, etc.) that have connected (and potentially elevated) network access or sensitive information.\", \"relevance\": \"Specifies types of business relationships and access levels targeted\" }, { \"quote\": \"This information may also reveal supply chains and shipment paths for the victim’s hardware and software resources.\", \"relevance\": \"Expands scope to include logistical/supply chain targeting\" } ], \"grounding_mode\": \"close_paraphrase\" } ], \"skipped_reason\": null }" [e160] [cursor=pointer]
